chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-672 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 18.05.2023 Mr. Aneel Kumar associate of Mr. Ghulamullah Chang advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with Inspector Muhammad Nadeem Arain PS Khipro. ----- Mr. Muhammad Raheem Gaju advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.5, which is taken on record. Statement of petitioner has been recorded. She has denied her abduction by any one and submits that she is residing with her parents. She has further disclosed in her statement that certain accused had abducted her, got her converted to Islam forcibly and out of them one Iqbal married with her. Investigating Officer present in court states that in the light of statement of petitioner he would dispose of the case Crime No.60/2023,u/s 496-A, 34 PPC PS Khipro District Sangharand in case any cognizable offence is made out against the accused against whom allegations of abduction have been leveled by the petitioner he will act in accordance with law. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition. As and when the report disposing of the case is submitted before the Magistrate by the IO, he shall act on the recommendation of the IO in disposing of the case. This petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
